title: Sen. Bill Cassidy signs onto brief calling 'anti-weaponization' fund a 'dire threat'
summary: Senator Bill Cassidy has joined an amicus brief opposing the Department of Justice's "anti-weaponization" fund, characterizing it as a "dire threat." The move reflects ongoing political debate over DOJ independence and its role in government oversight.
content: Sen. Bill Cassidy joined an amicus brief calling the Justice Department "anti-weaponization" fund a "dire threat."

zh.title: 卡西迪参议员加入诉状，将"反武器化"基金称为"严重威胁"
zh.summary: 卡西迪参议员加入了反对司法部"反武器化"基金的诉状，将其描述为"严重威胁"。这一举措反映了关于司法部独立性及其在政府监督中的作用的持续政治辩论。

title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
summary: A confirmed screwworm infestation case in Texas has triggered increased options trading in biotech stocks, particularly Zoetis, as investors position for potential winners in animal health and pest control. The outbreak underscores the commercial importance of livestock disease management.
content: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

zh.title: 德克萨斯州确认蛆虫感染病例推高两只生物技术股
zh.summary: 德克萨斯州确认的蛆虫感染病例引发了生物技术股期权交易增加，特别是Zoetis，因为投资者争相押注动物卫生和害虫防控领域的潜在赢家。这次疫情凸显了家畜疾病管理的商业重要性。

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX paid to secure its ticker symbol ahead of blockbuster IPO
summary: SpaceX has secured the ticker symbol "SPCX" ahead of its imminent initial public offering by purchasing it from Tuttle Capital Management's SPAC ETF. The acquisition demonstrates the company's preparation for its highly anticipated market debut next week.
content: When SpaceX shares make their public debut next week, they will be trading under the ticker “SPCX.” Until recently, that ticker belonged to Tuttle Capital Management’s SPAC and New Issue ETF.

zh.title: SpaceX在重磅IPO前支付费用获得股票代码
zh.summary: SpaceX通过从Tuttle资本管理公司的SPAC ETF购买获得了股票代码"SPCX"，为其即将进行的首次公开募股做准备。这项收购展示了该公司为下周备受期待的上市首秀所做的准备。

title: Bitcoin’s sagging price has crypto bears taking a victory lap. Why it’s too soon to count it out.
summary: Bitcoin has declined to its weakest level in months while U.S. stocks continue reaching record highs, prompting crypto bears to declare victory. However, analysts warn it may be premature to count the cryptocurrency out entirely.
content: While U.S. stocks have kept notching record highs, bitcoin is sliding to its weakest level in months.

zh.title: 比特币价格下跌至数月最低，加密熊市者欢呼雀跃。为什么现在还言之过早？
zh.summary: 比特币跌至数月来的最低水平，而美国股市继续创历史新高，促使加密熊市者宣布胜利。然而，分析师警告称完全看空这种加密货币可能为时过早。

title: I own a house with my sister, but the mortgage is in her name. Could this come back to bite me?
summary: A homeowner expresses concern about co-owning property with a sibling while the mortgage remains solely in the sibling's name, raising questions about financial liability and legal exposure. The arrangement highlights potential complications in shared real estate ownership among family members.
content: “My son, daughter-in-law and granddaughter live there and take care of utilities, yardwork and maintenance.”

zh.title: 我与妹妹共同拥有一套房子，但抵押贷款只以她的名义。这会对我造成不利影响吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主对与兄弟姐妹共同拥有房产但抵押贷款仅以兄弟姐妹名义存在的安排表示担忧，这引发了关于财务责任和法律风险的问题。该安排突出了家庭成员之间共同房地产所有权的潜在复杂性。

title: Wasted AI budgets at Nvidia, Uber, Microsoft and others sink ‘tokenmaxxing’ and trigger hiring
summary: Major technology companies including Nvidia, Uber, and Microsoft are cutting AI spending after years of overinvestment, inadvertently boosting hiring as businesses recognize human workers provide superior cost efficiency. The correction reveals limits to unchecked AI investment trends.
content: The U.S. job market actually is getting a boost from AI: Who knew human workers are cheaper?

zh.title: 英伟达、优步、微软等公司削减浪费的AI预算，打击"tokenmaxxing"并促进招聘
zh.summary: 包括英伟达、优步和微软在内的大型科技公司在多年过度投资后削减了AI支出，无意中促进了招聘，因为企业意识到人类员工提供更高的成本效率。这一调整揭示了不受控制的AI投资趋势的局限性。

title: Quantinuum stock opens at $68 per share after IPO
summary: Quantum computing company Quantinuum completed its initial public offering with shares opening at $68 per share, with technology giant Honeywell retaining a controlling stake. The listing positions Quantinuum as a significant player in the emerging quantum computing market.
content: Honeywell will retain a majority stake in Quantinuum and will continue to be a strategic customer and partner following the listing.

zh.title: 量子计算公司Quantinuum在IPO后股票以每股68美元开盘
zh.summary: 量子计算公司Quantinuum完成首次公开募股，股票以每股68美元开盘，科技巨头霍尼韦尔保留了控股权。该上市使Quantinuum成为新兴量子计算市场的重要参与者。

title: Long-term unemployment is surging in the U.S. There are hidden costs for workers and the economy
summary: Long-term unemployment in the United States is surging, with lasting negative effects on workers' financial stability, mental health, and family relationships that persist beyond reemployment. The trend raises concerns about both individual welfare and broader economic health.
content: Long-term unemployment can have ramifications on financial, emotional and family health that linger even after reentry into the workforce.

zh.title: 美国长期失业率激增 工人和经济面临隐性成本
zh.summary: 美国长期失业率激增，对工人的财务稳定、心理健康和家庭关系产生持久的负面影响，这些影响在重新就业后仍然存在。这一趋势引发了对个人福利和更广泛经济健康的担忧。

title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton agrees to plead guilty to retaining classified information: MS NOW
summary: Former Trump national security advisor John Bolton has agreed to plead guilty to retaining classified documents, reversing his earlier claims of innocence and political targeting. The guilty plea represents a significant development in ongoing classified information prosecutions.
content: When he was indicted, John Bolton said he was innocent and that he was being targeted because of his public opposition to President Trump.

zh.title: 前特朗普顾问约翰·博尔顿同意对保留机密信息认罪
zh.summary: 前特朗普国家安全顾问约翰·博尔顿同意对保留机密文件认罪，推翻了他之前关于无罪和政治打击的声明。认罪协议代表了持续进行的机密信息起诉中的重大进展。

title: Bitcoin is weathering its ugliest week in months as narrative fades and liquidity rotates
summary: Bitcoin is experiencing its worst week in months as the market loses its dominant investment narrative and capital rotates toward alternative assets. The downturn reflects broader market dynamics rather than fundamental flaws in the cryptocurrency technology.
content: Bitcoin is getting pummeled to kick off June as the market loses its dominant narrative and liquidity continues to rotate into other assets.

zh.title: 比特币叙事衰退和流动性轮转，经历数月来最糟糕的一周
zh.summary: 比特币正经历数月来最糟糕的一周，因为市场失去了主导投资叙事，资本向替代资产轮转。这次下跌反映了更广泛的市场动态，而非加密货币技术的根本缺陷。

title: This drugmaker is developing breakthroughs like an 'EpiPen for heart attacks.' The market has yet to give it credit
summary: An undisclosed pharmaceutical company is advancing innovative treatments including a rapid-response heart attack medication comparable to an "EpiPen" and a potential blockbuster lupus drug, yet the market has not valued these breakthroughs appropriately. The company represents an underrecognized opportunity in specialty pharmaceuticals.
content: The key to its growth are a non-opioid pain reliever, a potential blockbuster lupus treatment and a drug that has been dubbed an "EpiPen for heart attacks."

zh.title: 这家制药公司正在开发包括"心脏病发作的肾上腺素笔"等突破性产品，市场尚未给予应有认可
zh.summary: 一家未披露身份的制药公司正在推进创新治疗，包括类似"肾上腺素笔"的快速反应心脏病发作药物和潜在畅销的狼疮药物，但市场尚未恰当评估这些突破。该公司代表了专业制药领域被低估的机会。

title: ‘This is a tricky subject’: We’re in our 70s and our only child is 40. Do we reveal that we’re leaving her everything?
summary: Elderly parents in their 70s seek guidance on whether to reveal to their 40-year-old child that they will inherit the family estate. The dilemma reflects broader questions about financial transparency and family communication around wealth transfer planning.
content: “It makes us feel uncomfortable.”

zh.title: "这是个敏感话题"：我们70多岁，唯一的孩子40岁。我们应该透露将把所有财产留给她吗？
zh.summary: 70多岁的父母寻求指导，是否向40岁的独生子女透露将继承家族产业。这个困境反映了有关财务透明度和财富转移规划的家庭沟通的更广泛问题。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Five Below, Broadcom, Blackstone, UnitedHealth & more
summary: Multiple stocks including Five Below, Broadcom, Blackstone, and UnitedHealth are experiencing significant intraday price movements. The market activity reflects investor reactions to earnings reports, economic data, and ongoing sector rotation.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 股票盘中波动最大的个股：Five Below、博通、黑石、联合健康等
zh.summary: 包括Five Below、博通、黑石和联合健康在内的多只股票经历了盘中显著价格波动。市场活动反映了投资者对财报、经济数据和持续板块轮动的反应。

title: Elon Musk’s Social Security audit was an embarrassment. The real fraud is political.
summary: Commentary critiques a Social Security audit of Elon Musk-related claims as misguided, arguing the real issue is political weaponization rather than program fraud. The analysis suggests the audit reveals more about political motivations than actual system vulnerabilities.
content: Social Security’s watchdog did the math on the so-called fraud, and it’s a joke.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的社保审计很尴尬。真正的欺诈是政治。
zh.summary: 评论批评针对埃隆·马斯克相关声称的社保审计是方向错误的，主张真正的问题是政治武器化而非项目欺诈。该分析表明审计更多地反映了政治动机而非实际系统漏洞。

title: Quantinuum’s stock pops after IPO as Wall Street buys into the quantum boom
summary: Quantinuum's stock surged 13% above its IPO price on its first trading day, reaching a valuation exceeding $17 billion as Wall Street embraces the quantum computing sector. The strong debut reflects investor enthusiasm for quantum technology breakthroughs and their commercial potential.
content: The company was valued north of $17 billion as its shares were rising 13% above their IPO price.

zh.title: Quantinuum上市后股价上涨，华尔街看好量子热潮
zh.summary: Quantinuum股票在首个交易日内上涨13%超过发行价，估值超过170亿美元，因为华尔街接纳量子计算行业。强势首秀反映了投资者对量子技术突破及其商业潜力的热情。

title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
summary: Blackstone has restricted withdrawals from its flagship fund amid concerns about private asset valuations, signaling renewed anxiety in the private equity market about the sustainability of current pricing.

zh.title: 黑石集团限制旗舰基金提款，私人资产担忧卷土重来
zh.summary: 黑石集团在私人资产估值担忧之际限制了其旗舰基金的提款，这表明私募股权市场对当前定价可持续性的焦虑重新浮现。

title: Jobless claims jump to 4-month high, but don’t be fooled: Layoffs aren’t on the rise
summary: Jobless claims reached a four-month high in late May, but the increase was primarily driven by Memorial Day timing rather than rising corporate layoffs. The data suggests the labor market remains relatively stable despite the uptick.
content: The number of people who applied for unemployment benefits at the end of May jumped to a four-month high, but not because businesses are laying off more workers. The timing of the Memorial Day holiday was an X-factor.

zh.title: 失业申请数跳升至四个月高位，但别上当：裁员并未增加
zh.summary: 五月底失业申请数达到四个月高位，但增长主要是由于阵亡将士纪念日的时间因素，而非企业裁员增加。数据表明，尽管出现增长，劳动力市场仍保持相对稳定。

title: This investing strategy digs deeper to find hidden stocks riding the AI wave
summary: Beyond major chipmakers and cloud providers, investors can access the AI hardware infrastructure boom through lesser-known companies in supporting supply chain sectors. The strategy focuses on finding non-obvious plays riding the generative-AI expansion wave.
content: There are plenty of ways to jump into the generative-AI hardware infrastructure expansion beyond the familiar chip makers and hyperscalers.

zh.title: 这个投资策略深入挖掘搭乘AI浪潮的隐藏股票
zh.summary: 除了主要芯片制造商和云提供商外，投资者可以通过支持供应链领域的鲜为人知的公司参与AI硬件基础设施的增长。该策略专注于找到搭乘生成式AI扩张浪潮的非主流投资机会。

title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
summary: Coinbase is offering perpetual futures contracts that allow traders to speculate on private company valuations before they go public, enabling early exposure to high-profile pre-IPO companies like SpaceX without direct equity ownership.
content: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

zh.title: 投资者可以通过Coinbase永续期货在IPO前'购买'SpaceX
zh.summary: Coinbase提供永续期货合约，允许交易者在公司上市前对私人公司估值进行投机，使投资者能够在不直接拥有股权的情况下早期获得SpaceX等知名IPO前公司的敞口。

title: Oil prices fall 3% on report Trump reluctant to restart Iran war
summary: Oil prices dropped 3% following reports that President Trump is reluctant to restart military conflict with Iran unless U.S. troops are directly attacked. The comments reduced geopolitical risk premium in energy markets.
content: President Donald Trump told aides that he won't resume the war unless U.S. troops are killed, according to The Wall Street Journal.

zh.title: 基于特朗普不愿重启伊朗战争的报道，油价下跌3%
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统不愿重启与伊朗军事冲突（除非美国军队受到直接攻击）的报道之后，油价下跌了3%。这些评论降低了能源市场的地缘政治风险溢价。

title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
summary: Kalshi, a prediction markets platform, is developing an institutional-grade trading terminal to serve high-volume traders with advanced tools and analytics similar to Bloomberg's role in traditional finance.
content: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

zh.title: 知情人士称Kalshi正在为高端交易者构建预测市场'彭博终端'
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Kalshi正在开发一个机构级别的交易终端，为大宗交易者提供类似于彭博在传统金融中角色的高级工具和分析。

title: Tech is flashing a warning sign last seen in 2020. Strategist Larry McDonald sees a massive rotation coming.
summary: Strategist Larry McDonald warns that tech stocks are showing warning signals last seen in 2020, with investors treating them as a safe haven rather than seeking growth. He predicts a significant market rotation toward hard assets.
content: Larry McDonald warns that investors are piling into tech stocks thinking it’s the “safe trade,” but should be thining about hard assets instead.

zh.title: 科技股现2020年来未见的警告信号 麦克唐纳预测即将迎来大规模轮动
zh.summary: 策略师拉里·麦克唐纳警告，科技股正呈现出2020年以来未曾出现过的警告信号，投资者将其视为避险资产而非增长机会。他预测市场将出现向硬资产的大幅轮动。

title: Micron, Marvell, and Broadcom lead chipmakers' premarket losses
summary: Major chipmakers including Micron, Marvell, and Broadcom fell sharply in premarket trading following Broadcom's disappointing earnings report. The weakness reflected broader concerns about the chip sector's near-term growth prospects.
content: U.S. chipmakers plunged in premarket trading after Broadcom earnings disappointed investors.

zh.title: 美光、Marvell和博通领跌芯片股盘前行情
zh.summary: 美光、Marvell和博通等主要芯片制造商在博通公布令人失望的财报后于盘前大幅下跌。这一跌幅反映了市场对芯片行业短期增长前景的担忧。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Broadcom, Netflix, Oracle, Microsoft, CrowdStrike & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on top tech stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Broadcom, Netflix, Oracle, Microsoft, and CrowdStrike on Thursday. The calls likely reflected reactions to recent earnings and market conditions.
content: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周四分析师重要观点汇总：英伟达、苹果、博通、Netflix、甲骨文、微软、CrowdStrike等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师周四对英伟达、苹果、博通、Netflix、甲骨文、微软和CrowdStrike等顶级科技股发表了重要观点。这些观点可能反映了分析师对近期财报和市场状况的反应。

title: Higher mortgage rates don't just keep buyers on the sidelines. Application denials rise too
summary: Mortgage application denial rates climbed to 15.1% in 2024 from 12.2% in 2021, rising alongside higher interest rates. The data shows elevated borrowing costs aren't just discouraging home purchases but also making approval harder for qualified buyers.
content: The denial rate in loan applications was 15.1% in 2024, up from 12.2% in 2021, a rise that occurred alongside surging mortgage rates, the St. Louis Fed found.

zh.title: 高抵押贷款利率不仅让购房者观望 申请被拒的情况也在增加
zh.summary: 抵押贷款申请被拒率从2021年的12.2%上升到2024年的15.1%，与更高的利率相伴随。数据显示，借贷成本上升不仅阻止了购房，也使符合条件的借款人更难获得批准。

title: Trump's 'big beautiful bill' has a 'double taxation' trap for top earners, tax lawyers say
summary: Tax lawyers identified a potential "double taxation" issue in Trump's proposed legislation where trust income could face taxation at multiple levels. The concern raises questions about the bill's impact on high-income earners and estate planning.
content: A new guide by Congress' tax policy staff indicates that trust income can be taxed twice.

zh.title: 特朗普的"宏伟法案"中有"双重征税"陷阱，税务律师表示
zh.summary: 税务律师在特朗普提议的立法中发现了潜在的"双重征税"问题，其中信托收入可能面临多个层级的征税。这个问题引发了人们对该法案对高收入者和遗产规划影响的疑问。

title: Why institutional investors are returning to retail 'in a very big way'
summary: Institutional investors are significantly increasing their presence in retail real estate, with transaction volumes surpassing $15 billion in Q1 2026, up 5% year-over-year. The renewed interest suggests institutional confidence in the sector's long-term prospects.
content: Investment transaction volumes reached more than $15 billion during the first quarter, an increase of 5% compared with Q1 2025, according to JLL.

zh.title: 为什么机构投资者以"非常大的方式"重返零售地产
zh.summary: 机构投资者显著增加了在零售地产中的存在，2026年第一季度的交易量超过150亿美元，比上年同期增长5%。这种重新的兴趣表明机构对该部门长期前景充满信心。

title: How ‘no tax on overtime’ could impact behavior in good ways — and bad
summary: The proposed "no tax on overtime" provision in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act could incentivize work and productivity but also create potential for abuse by bad actors. The policy presents both intended benefits and unintended risks depending on implementation.
content: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act deduction that could encourage bad actors.

zh.title: "加班不纳税"政策如何以积极和消极的方式影响行为
zh.summary: 《一揽子大法案》中提议的"加班不纳税"条款可能会激励工作和生产力,但也可能为不当行为人创造滥用的机会。该政策根据实施方式呈现出既有预期的好处,也存在意外的风险。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Broadcom, Micron, Petco, Coinbase and more
summary: Several stocks including Broadcom, Micron, Petco, and Coinbase showed the largest premarket moves, likely reflecting overnight earnings and economic data releases. The moves set the stage for broader market direction on the trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票:博通、美光、Petco、Coinbase等
zh.summary: 包括博通、美光、Petco和Coinbase在内的几只股票显示了最大的盘前波动,这可能反映了隔夜财报和经济数据发布的影响。这些波动为交易日更广泛的市场走向奠定了基础。

title: This natural gas stock has lots of upside even after U.S.-Iran war ends, JPMorgan says
summary: JPMorgan upgraded a natural gas stock to overweight from neutral, signaling continued upside potential even if U.S.-Iran tensions ease. The analyst view suggests structural demand fundamentals will support the stock independent of geopolitical risk.
content: The investment bank upgraded the gas name to overweight from neutral.

zh.title: 摩根大通表示:这只天然气股票即使在美伊战争结束后仍有巨大上升潜力
zh.summary: 摩根大通将一只天然气股票从中性评级上调至增持,表明即使美伊紧张局势缓和,该股票仍有持续上升潜力。分析师观点表明,结构性需求基本面将独立于地缘政治风险支撑该股票。

title: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
summary: SoftBank shares declined 11% in a U.S. tech sector sell-off driven by profit taking. The decline reflects broader market volatility affecting technology stocks.
content: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

zh.title: 软银股价在更广泛的科技股抛售中暴跌逾11%
zh.summary: 在美国科技板块因获利回吐而抛售的背景下，软银股价下跌11%。这次下跌反映了影响科技股的更广泛市场波动。

title: Finland's president says EU should expand to 40 states — including Canada
summary: Finnish President Alexander Stubb advocates for EU expansion to 40 member states, including Canada, to strengthen the bloc's global influence. The proposal suggests a significant shift in EU membership strategy to compete internationally.
content: Finnish President Alexander Stubb said the European Union needs to expand to project power on the global stage.

zh.title: 芬兰总统称欧盟应扩展到40个国家——包括加拿大
zh.summary: 芬兰总统亚历山大·斯图布倡导欧盟扩展到40个成员国，包括加拿大，以加强该联盟的全球影响力。该提议表明欧盟成员国战略的重大转变，以在国际竞争中占据优势。

title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
summary: Biotech mergers and acquisitions are accelerating in 2026, driven by patent expirations, strong public markets, and pharmaceutical companies expanding their drug pipelines. This activity level marks the strongest year for biotech dealmaking since before the COVID-19 pandemic.
content: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

zh.title: "就像商品要绝版一样大量购买"：生物科技并购有望创下疫前最佳年份
zh.summary: 2026年生物科技并购交易加速，由专利到期、强劲的公开市场和制药公司扩展其药物管道所驱动。这一交易水平标志着自COVID-19疫情前以来生物科技交易最强的一年。

title: 'Library of Things' aims to help people save money
summary: A 'Library of Things' initiative in Leamington allows residents to borrow household items, reducing consumer spending and promoting resource sharing. The volunteer-led program offers an alternative to purchasing new goods.
content: Volunteers in Leamington have launched a new type of library where you can borrow household items.

zh.title: "东西图书馆"旨在帮助人们省钱
zh.summary: 莱明顿的"东西图书馆"倡议允许居民借用家居用品，减少消费支出并促进资源共享。这个志愿者主导的计划为购买新商品提供了替代方案。

title: S&P 500 futures fall after index snaps 9-day win streak amid rising Middle East tensions: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 ended its nine-day winning streak as rising oil prices and Treasury yields pressured all three major indexes. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East contributed to the broader market decline.
content: Rising oil prices and Treasury yields weighed all three major indexes lower on Wednesday.

zh.title: 标普500期货下跌，指数在中东局势升温中打破9天连涨纪录：实时更新
zh.summary: 由于油价上升和国债收益率上升对三大主要指数造成压力，标普500指数结束了九天的连涨纪录。中东地缘政治紧张局势加剧了更广泛的市场下跌。

title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
summary: U.S. officials have confirmed the presence of flesh-eating screwworms in the country, raising public health and agricultural concerns. This parasitic infestation poses a threat to both human and animal health.

zh.title: 美国官员称确认发现食肉蝇蛆虫
zh.summary: 美国官员已确认该国境内存在食肉蝇蛆虫，引发了公共卫生和农业担忧。这种寄生虫感染对人类和动物健康都构成威胁。

title: Honeywell's Quantinuum raises $1.68 billion in U.S. IPO as quantum computing heats up, Reuters reports
summary: Honeywell's Quantinuum quantum computing company completed a $1.68 billion U.S. IPO at $60 per share, reflecting growing investor interest in the quantum computing sector. The offering underscores momentum in advanced computing technologies.
content: Honeywell's Quantinuum said on Wednesday it had raised $1.68 billion in its U.S. initial public offering after pricing shares at $60 apiece.

zh.title: 霍尼韦尔量子公司Quantinuum在美IPO融资16.8亿美元，量子计算领域升温
zh.summary: 霍尼韦尔旗下量子计算公司Quantinuum完成16.8亿美元美国IPO，股价定在每股60美元，反映出投资者对量子计算领域日益增长的兴趣。此次发行彰显了先进计算技术的发展势头。

title: CrowdStrike is a buy, just not yet. Here's why
summary: CrowdStrike reported strong earnings results and announced a 4-for-1 stock split, though the stock declined as some investors took profits. An analyst views the pullback as a potential buying opportunity for long-term investors.
content: On top of the beat-and-raise, CrowdStrike announced a 4-for-1 stock split. But short-term thinkers sold the stock.

zh.title: CrowdStrike值得买入，但时机还不对
zh.summary: CrowdStrike报告了强劲的财报业绩并宣布实施4:1股票分割，尽管股价因部分投资者获利回吐而下跌。分析师认为这次回调可能是长期投资者的买入机会。

title: Quantinuum raises $1.68 billion in IPO that seeks to give quantum computing more street cred
summary: Quantinuum raised $1.68 billion through a traditional IPO, bucking the trend of other quantum computing companies that have opted for SPAC mergers. This direct public offering signals confidence in the quantum sector's maturation and mainstream credibility. The move distinguishes Quantinuum's path to public markets and provides a validation point for the still-developing quantum computing industry.
content: Quantinuum is pursuing a traditional IPO, whereas many other quantum players have gone the SPAC route.

zh.title: Quantinuum通过IPO融资16.8亿美元，提升量子计算的认可度
zh.summary: Quantinuum通过传统IPO融资16.8亿美元，打破了其他量子计算公司选择SPAC合并的趋势。这次直接公开发行表明量子行业的成熟和主流认可度提升。这一举措区别了Quantinuum的上市路径，为仍在发展中的量子计算行业提供了验证。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower on renewed Middle East tensions
summary: Asia-Pacific stock markets declined following escalated tensions between Iran and the U.S., raising concerns about potential geopolitical spillover effects. Investors worry that Middle East tensions could sustain elevated inflation, complicating economic outlooks for the region. The market reaction reflects broader nervousness about global supply chain disruptions.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.

zh.title: 亚太市场因中东局势紧张而低开
zh.summary: 亚太股市因伊朗与美国紧张关系升级而下跌，引发对地缘政治溢出效应的担忧。投资者担心中东紧张局势可能导致通胀居高不下，复杂化该地区的经济前景。市场反应反映了对全球供应链中断的广泛担忧。

title: Inside India newsletter: Why Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have surged past India within a week
summary: Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have outpaced India's in recent weeks as global investors shift focus away from Indian equities. India's cooling domestic consumption narrative and technological lag in artificial intelligence are driving the divergence. The shift signals investor reassessment of growth prospects across different Asian economies.
content: The Indian equity market is losing favour with global investors, as its domestic consumption story weakens and the country lags in AI.

zh.title: 印度通讯：台湾和韩国股市为何在一周内超越印度
zh.summary: 近期台湾和韩国股市超越了印度，全球投资者焦点从印度股票转向其他市场。印度国内消费冷却和人工智能技术滞后是导致分化的原因。这一转变反映投资者正在重新评估不同亚洲经济体的增长前景。

title: Broadcom’s stock falls despite accelerating AI-chip growth
summary: Broadcom's stock declined despite the company's AI chip business accelerating, as the latest revenue results failed to exceed already high market expectations. The sell-off reflects investor disappointment following the stock's recent sharp gains, which had already priced in strong performance. The disconnect highlights how companies must deliver exceptional results to overcome stretched valuations.
content: Latest revenue figures lack meaningful upside after the stock’s sharp recent rally.

zh.title: 博通股价下跌，尽管AI芯片业务加速增长
zh.summary: 尽管公司AI芯片业务加速，但博通股价下跌，因为最新收入结果未能超越已经很高的市场预期。抛售反映了投资者的失望，因为股票近期大幅上涨已经反映了强劲表现。这种脱节突显出公司必须提供卓越业绩才能克服被高估的估值。

title: CrowdStrike’s stock falls as investors find more reason to pan cybersecurity earnings
summary: CrowdStrike's stock declined despite exceeding financial expectations, following a pattern similar to fellow cybersecurity firm Palo Alto Networks. The sell-off suggests investors are becoming increasingly selective about cybersecurity valuations despite strong earnings performance. The trend indicates growing skepticism about growth premiums in the cybersecurity sector.
content: Like Palo Alto Networks before it, CrowdStrike beats financial expectations but sees its stock get punished

zh.title: 随着投资者对网络安全收益的批评，CrowdStrike股价下跌
zh.summary: CrowdStrike股价下跌，尽管超过财务预期，但跟随同行网络安全公司Palo Alto Networks的模式。抛售表明投资者对网络安全估值变得更加挑剔，尽管收益表现强劲。这一趋势表明对网络安全部门增长溢价的怀疑不断增加。

title: Why we're raising our price target on Broadcom despite its post-earnings sell-off
summary: Despite a post-earnings stock decline, analysts raised their price target for Broadcom, citing the company's robust AI business fundamentals. The upgrade reflects confidence that Broadcom's artificial intelligence revenue will exceed conservative market estimates going forward. The divergence between stock performance and analyst outlook suggests the market may have overreacted to earnings results.
content: Broadcom's AI business will continue to shine and outpace the conservative forecast.

zh.title: 尽管博通收益后抛售，我们为什么要提高其价格目标
zh.summary: 尽管收益后股价下跌，分析师提高了博通的价格目标，理由是公司强大的AI业务基础。升级反映了分析师相信博通的人工智能收入将在未来超过保守的市场预期。股票表现与分析师前景之间的分歧表明市场可能对收益结果反应过度。

title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
summary: Amazon engineers publicly criticized the company for investing $200 billion in AI infrastructure while simultaneously laying off 30,000 employees. The contradiction highlights tensions between corporate technology investments and workforce reduction decisions. The criticism reflects growing employee concerns about strategic priorities and job security at major tech firms.
content: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

zh.title: 亚马逊西雅图工程师抨击公司在建设AI数据中心同时裁员30,000人
zh.summary: 亚马逊工程师公开批评该公司在投资2000亿美元用于AI基础设施的同时裁员30,000名员工。这种矛盾突显了企业科技投资与劳动力缩减决策之间的紧张关系。这一批评反映了主要科技公司员工对战略优先事项和工作安全的日益增长的关注。
